title: Knowledge Adapter Contract (adapter.md frontmatter)
description: Machine contract of an attachable knowledge source. The markdown body carries What this source knows, How to query, When to consult, Citation rule, and On failure.

kind.description: mcp = queried via MCP tools; filesystem = read from local paths.

capabilities.description: Capability tags matched against stage knowledge_slots (e.g. org-context, prior-art, personal-notes).

tools_required.description: MCP tool name patterns this adapter needs (informational; availability is checked at run time).

failure_mode.description: degrade: proceed and record knowledge_gaps in the artifact (F6). block: escalate the run.
